content:

  "pronunciation_help": "",
  "word_type": "",
  "simple_explanation": "",

  "spoken_use": "",
  "natural_native_use": "",
  "emotional_tone": "",

  "formal_informal_note": "",

Return ONLY a valid JSON array containing the 50 objects. Do not include markdown code blocks or any other text.
</USER_REQUEST>

</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
